name: remote-ss-proxy-controller
description: Manage remote Shadowsocks proxy lifecycle for Remote-SSH from VS Code UI.

remoteProxy.sshHost.description: Optional SSH host override. If empty, host is derived from the active remote authority.

remoteProxy.socksPort.description: SOCKS local bind port on remote host.

remoteProxy.httpPort.description: HTTP CONNECT local bind port on remote host. Used by HTTPS_PROXY/HTTP_PROXY env vars for tools that don't speak SOCKS5 (e.g. Claude Code's undici/fetch stack).

remoteProxy.shadowsocksVersion.description: Shadowsocks Rust version used by install/reinstall actions.

remoteProxy.outlineHelperVersion.description: Release tag in this repo to pull the outline-helper binary from. Only used when an Outline-style salt prefix is configured (via access key or 'remoteProxy.outlinePrefixHex').

remoteProxy.outlinePrefixHex.description: Hex-encoded salt-prefix bytes for Outline-compatible DPI evasion (default value mimics a TLS record header — matches VanyaVPN's tun2socks config). When set, the extension routes through outline-helper instead of sslocal. Clear to use plain ShadowSocks. Overrides any prefix carried by the access key.

remoteProxy.testUrl.description: URL used by test connectivity action.

remoteProxy.testExpectedHttpCodes.description: Comma-separated HTTP codes considered successful by connectivity test.

remoteProxy.logTailLines.description: Number of trailing log lines to fetch.

remoteProxy.confirmBeforeMutations.description: Require confirmation before enable, disable, and reinstall actions.

remoteProxy.clusterProfile.description: How commands are executed on the remote host. All profiles connect via SSH.
enumDescriptions: Run commands directly on the remote host (default)
Wrap commands in 'docker exec -i <container>' on the remote host
Use a custom command wrapper template

remoteProxy.dockerContainer.description: Docker container name or ID to execute commands in (used when clusterProfile is 'docker').

remoteProxy.customCommandTemplate.description: Custom command wrapper template (used when clusterProfile is 'custom'). Use {{SCRIPT}} as placeholder for the bash invocation. Example: 'sudo {{SCRIPT}}'

remoteProxy.wrapClaudeCode.description: Auto-wrap the Anthropic Claude Code extension's bundled 'claude' native binary so it inherits HTTPS_PROXY when launched by the extension host (which strips proxy env). Restored on Proxy: Disable. Linux/macOS only.
